title: Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi (disambiguation)
content:
'''Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi''' could refer to:

==Canon==
*{{Film|VI}} (the film)
*''[[Return of the Jedi: Beware the Power of the Dark Side!]]'' ([[Canon]] junior novelization)
*''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (paperback novel)]]''
*''[[Episode VI: Return of the Jedi Read-Along Storybook and CD]]''

*[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi'']] (novelization)
*''[[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi]]'' (republished Marvel comic adaptation)
*''[[Star Wars: Episode VI — Return of the Jedi]]'' (remastered Marvel comic adaptation)
*[[Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi (junior novelization)|''Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi'']] ([[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] junior novelization)
*''[[Return of the Jedi: A Storybook]]''
*[[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (Random House)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'']] (Random House/LucasBooks for Young Readers)
*[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'']] (abridged audiobook)
*''[[Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi]]''
*''[[Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi]]''
*[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (video game)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'']] (video game)
*[[Return of the Jedi (radio)|''Return of the Jedi'']] (radio drama)
*[[Return of the Jedi (book-and-record)|''Return of the Jedi'']] (book and record)
*[[Return of the Jedi (TCG)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'']] (trading card game)

==Real-world==
*[[Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi (soundtrack)|''Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi'']] (soundtrack)
